stories.title: Cameron Boozer amassed 24 points (10-of-13 FGs, 2-of-3 FTs), seven rebounds, three assists, one steal and one three-pointer in Thursday’s win over the Hawks.
stories.summary: Boozer and the Grizzlies needed a big win to clinch a spot in Saturday’s semifinals, and they understood the assignment from the opening tip. Memphis led 32-2 and never…

stories.title: Jaden Akins finished Thursday’s loss to the Warriors with 21 points (9-of-20 FGs), two rebounds, one assist and three three-pointers.
